text.title: AI-Generated Layout Review Checklist Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-generated-layout-review-checklist methodology end-to-end.

step.name: collect-artefacts
step.input: Mockup link + research artefact ref + brand-guideline + token JSON
step.action: Pull each artefact into the review workspace. Verify each link resolves.
step.decision-gate: If any artefact missing → BLOCK at c01 immediately.

step.name: run-mechanical-scans
step.action: Run token-compliance diff (haiku) and a11y contrast/focus audit (haiku). Attach raw outputs.

step.name: walk-ten-checks
step.action: Apply c01..c10 in order; record verdict + evidence_pointer per check.
step.decision-gate: If any verdict=BLOCK, overall verdict is BLOCK; stop and notify author.

step.name: write-rationale-and-attestation
step.action: Compose rationale (≥20 words when verdict != APPROVE) + record ai_tool_attestation.

step.name: validate-and-route
step.action: Run validate-ai-generated-layout-review-checklist.py. Route per verdict (BLOCK/REQUEST_CHANGES/APPROVE/APPROVE_WITH_NOTE) into design-system tracker.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, the review cannot be marked ship-ready.
